title: Executive Page Loading & Navigation Fix

tabsAudited.label: Executive Home
issuesFound: Heavy lazy bundle and command summary fetch without timeout caused long rendering.
fixesApplied: Lazy tab loading ceiling; command summary uses fetchWithTimeout and loading ceiling.

tabsAudited.label: Executive Accountability
issuesFound: Panel could remain on loading skeleton when lazy chunk or API hung.
fixesApplied: Loading ceiling fallback with source label and retry; API fetch watchdog via shared degraded state.

tabsAudited.label: Executive Forecast
issuesFound: Panel could remain on loading skeleton when lazy chunk or API hung.
fixesApplied: Loading ceiling fallback with source label and retry; API fetch watchdog via shared degraded state.

tabsAudited.label: Pipeline Intelligence
issuesFound: Panel could remain on loading skeleton when lazy chunk or API hung.
fixesApplied: Loading ceiling fallback with source label and retry; API fetch watchdog via shared degraded state.

tabsAudited.label: Workforce Intelligence
issuesFound: Nav used external Link to /executive/workforce-intelligence; tab never activated in dashboard.
fixesApplied: Inline DashboardTabPanel with WorkforceIntelligencePanel; removed external href.

issuesFound: Heavy lazy bundle and command summary fetch without timeout caused long rendering.
Panel could remain on loading skeleton when lazy chunk or API hung.
Nav used external Link to /executive/workforce-intelligence; tab never activated in dashboard.
fixesApplied: Normalize executive tab URL aliases (executive-forecast, autopilot-ops, execution-center, hiring-placement).
Inline workforce-intelligence as dashboard tab panel.
Executive lazy tab loading fallbacks with 5s ceiling and retry.
Degraded panel states for accountability, forecast, and pipeline intelligence APIs.
Executive command summary fetch timeout and loading ceiling.
Lazy tab loading ceiling; command summary uses fetchWithTimeout and loading ceiling.
Loading ceiling fallback with source label and retry; API fetch watchdog via shared degraded state.
Inline DashboardTabPanel with WorkforceIntelligencePanel; removed external href.
